description: Dense bitmap (used to track atoms used by uncollected zones) computed the wrong bitmask when checking a single bit, off-by-one collision across word boundaries. With --enable-symbols-as-weakmap-keys and a class with #private fields seeded as WeakMap keys across globals, the symbol entry was incorrectly considered marked → `!gc::IsAboutToBeFinalized` UAF assert in WeakMap::clearAndCompact, crash on opt build. sec-high. Fix: correct bitmask calculation (git 3a8fb49d343b r=sfink, Phabricator D263252, 1-line Bitmap.h fix).
